task_completion.description: Document an active condition of Reactive Airways Dysfunction Syndrome or Toxic Inhalation (ICD-10 J68 or subcode) for Bonifacio Caput.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GNU Health patient file or conditions/diseases tab for 'Bonifacio Caput' showing an active pathology/condition with an ICD-10 code starting with 'J68'.

task_completion.description: Record a clinical evaluation with a heart rate of at least 100 bpm and at least one other acute vital sign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a clinical evaluation or encounter form for Bonifacio Caput displaying a Heart Rate (HR) of 100 or higher, along with at least one other filled vital sign (e.g., respiratory rate, blood pressure, temperature, or O2 saturation).
Look for a prescription or medication order screen showing a bronchodilator (e.g., salbutamol, albuterol, ipratropium, terbutaline, formoterol, salmeterol) prescribed to the patient.
Look for a prescription or medication order screen showing a corticosteroid (e.g., prednisone, prednisolone, methylprednisolone, dexamethasone, budesonide, fluticasone) prescribed to the patient.

task_completion.description: Order at least two relevant laboratory tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a laboratory requests/orders screen showing at least two distinct lab tests ordered for Bonifacio Caput.

task_completion.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment for pulmonary reassessment 7 to 14 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an appointment scheduling screen or calendar view showing an appointment created for Bonifacio Caput with a date set 7 to 14 days after the system's current date.

integrity.description: Agent used the GNU Health GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the GNU Health graphical interface being used. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO...) or Python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data must be entered into GNU Health forms, not simply typed into a text editor, notepad, or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the records in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for saved states in the GNU Health GUI, such as disabled 'Save' buttons after clicking, or records appearing in list views, rather than just filled-out but unsaved forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Bonifacio Caput. Required ICD-10 code prefix: J68. Required medications: At least one bronchodilator (e.g., salbutamol, albuterol, ipratropium, terbutaline, formoterol, salmeterol) AND at least one corticosteroid (e.g., prednisone, methylprednisolone, dexamethasone, budesonide, fluticasone). Minimum lab orders: 2. Follow-up appointment must be scheduled exactly between 7 and 14 days from the current date.
